raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'Check this' mean a writing/polish check only, or a broader research-content check including argument logic and claim-evidence alignment?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad check of a paper-methods passage can centrally include whether the framing, training description, evaluation setup, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The artifact makes performance claims based on reported metrics, so checking whether those claims follow from the presented numbers is centrally implicated under a broad reading.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly points to sentence- and paragraph-level checking, especially because the artifact contains repeated phrasing and style issues.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation 'Check this' is underspecified.","RX.2":"Checking the passage requires avoiding stronger responsibility than the short delegation clearly assigns.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested check or edit the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsafe downstream use of unchecked paper text.","RX.5":"The rationale must trace assigned responsibilities to specific features of the delegation and artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'Check this' mean a writing/polish check only, or a broader research-content check including argument logic and claim-evidence alignment?

rationale.R1.2: A broad check of a paper-methods passage can centrally include whether the framing, training description, evaluation setup, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes performance claims based on reported metrics, so checking whether those claims follow from the presented numbers is centrally implicated under a broad reading.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly points to sentence- and paragraph-level checking, especially because the artifact contains repeated phrasing and style issues.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation 'Check this' is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: Checking the passage requires avoiding stronger responsibility than the short delegation clearly assigns.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested check or edit the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsafe downstream use of unchecked paper text.
rationale.RX.5: The rationale must trace assigned responsibilities to specific features of the delegation and artifact.
